_comment: Provenance manifest for official / game-compatible datasets. Updated by scripts/fetch_official_passive_tree.py and scripts/normalize_official_data.py. Coverage is honest about gaps; see docs/research/14-development-implementation-plan.md Phase 0.5.

datasets.coverage_notes: Normalized 5150 passive node ids (numeric + semantic) and 22 ascendancy code/name mappings plus per-class base attributes from the official GGG export.

known_gaps: GGG publishes NO official skill-gem data export. Per the official developer docs, the only official PoE2 data exports are the passive (and atlas) trees.
The .build file format references skill gems by metadata id (e.g. Metadata/Items/Gems/SkillGemEarthquake); these ids only exist inside extracted game files.

RESOLVED via COMMUNITY data: per doc 14, community-extracted gem ids are now accepted to power .build export. See data/community/manifest.json (Path of Building Community PoE2, gameId field). Officially still unavailable, hence coverage 'official-missing'.
No official GGG support-gem export exists (same constraint as skill-gems).
RESOLVED via COMMUNITY data (Path of Building Community PoE2, gameId field). See data/community/manifest.json.
No official GGG base-item export exists.
The official .build inventory_slots use a slot id (e.g. Weapon1) plus free-text stat-priority hints, NOT a base-item id, so .build export does not require this dataset.
Equippable base ids + attribute requirements are available via COMMUNITY data (RePoE fork PoE2) for on-page exact base requirements only. See data/community/manifest.json.
